name: P:GTA.NaturalMotion.FallOverWallHelper.AngleDirWithWallNormal
summary: Maximum angle in degrees (between the direction of the velocity of the COM and the wall normal) to start to apply forces and torques to fall over the wall.
remarks:
Default value = 180.0f.
            Min value = 0.0f.
            Max value = 180.0f.
